text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of Narita Brian's debut is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check the list, but there's a normal number of
racers for a debut race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. How I'm feeling now doesn't really
matter.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I won't know anything until I run. But this just
might be the place that actually fulfills me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...All right, it's time. My Twinkle Series debut
starts here.
